instruction: Use this public export as a safe summary of SIMA agent capabilities before calling the OpenAPI schema.

public_repository.purpose: Public SDK, examples, documentation, and discovery assets.

wallet_authentication.name: Request wallet nonce
wallet_authentication.notes: Prepares a wallet authentication challenge. Does not sign messages.

wallet_authentication.name: Verify wallet signature
wallet_authentication.notes: Verifies wallet ownership with a caller-provided signature.

protection_quote.name: Create protection quote
protection_quote.notes: Quote only. Does not issue protection, collect payment, or activate coverage.

treasury_payment.name: List payment destinations
treasury_payment.notes: Read-only public payment destination discovery. Does not expose private keys.

treasury_payment.name: Create payment intent
treasury_payment.notes: Preparation only. Does not execute transfers.

certificates.name: Verify certificate
certificates.notes: Record matching only. Does not approve claims or payouts.

certificates.name: List certificates
certificates.notes: Returns records owned by the authenticated wallet account.

claims.name: Prepare claim intake
claims.notes: Intake only. Does not approve claims or authorize payouts.
